title: How did they kill Ireul
wikitext:
[]: How did they kill Ireul?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sat Oct 03, 2009 2:24 pm That entire episode confused me. How did a computer program kill that Angel?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Oct 03, 2009 2:43 pm Iruel became a virus. Ritsuko did her thing and terminated the virus.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Oct 03, 2009 2:49 pm I believe that their goal was to structure an evolutionary path that would lead to a dead end or death.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Oct 03, 2009 2:51 pm Whenever they sent something in to kill Iruel it would evolve so that whatever they were using would actually help the Angel instead of destroy it. So what they did was force it to evolve into, as EM said, an evolutionary dead end or death itself.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Sat Oct 03, 2009 4:23 pm Sachi wrote: Whenever they sent something in to kill Iruel it would evolve so that whatever they were using would actually help the Angel instead of destroy it. So what they did was force it to evolve into, as EM said, an evolutionary dead end or death itself.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Oct 03, 2009 5:19 pm I always thought it would've been funny if right as they reached the point where Iruel hacked the Magi it would've stopped and said "A strange game... the only winning move is not to play... how about a game of chess?"

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Oct 03, 2009 5:43 pm I have the notion that it basically evolved to a point where it was indistinguishable from the rest of the system, and thus no longer an angel. Technically it never left.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Sat Oct 03, 2009 5:55 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: I always thought it would've been funny if right as they reached the point where Iruel hacked the Magi it would've stopped and said "A strange game... the only winning move is not to play... how about a game of chess?"

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sat Oct 03, 2009 6:15 pm When it comes to this angel in general, this is what comes to my mind.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Sat Oct 03, 2009 10:57 pm NemZ wrote: I have the notion that it basically evolved to a point where it was indistinguishable from the rest of the system, and thus no longer an angel. Technically it never left.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Oct 03, 2009 11:18 pm Episode 13 wrote: Ritsuko:As long as the ANGELS keeps evolution, we still have a chance. Gendou:Promotion of the evolution? Ritsuko:Yes, sir. Gendou: The end of the evolution is self-destruction. It is death itself. Fuyutsuki:Then, what we should do is to promote evolution. Ritsuko:If the ANGELS consider effective means of the survival, they may choose the co-existance with MAGI. Glasses:But how? Ritsuko:If the target is the computer itself, we can reverse hack by directly connecting Casper and the ANGELS, and by doing so, self-destruct promotion code can be send in. However...

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Mon Oct 05, 2009 3:42 am "Evolutionary dead-end" etc.? Meaning they were foreshadowing the end of the show in ep. 13? Or at least what Misato said in EoE. Even though I prefer to believe it's not true, I thought Anno was sort of winging it at the end heehee

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Tue Oct 06, 2009 6:47 am [code:1]kill -9 angel11[/code:1] And if that don't work, try sudo-ing it.

[]:             Quote Post by Lui » Tue Oct 06, 2009 4:34 pm So could you burn Iruel to a CD? I want one.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Tue Oct 06, 2009 6:48 pm Dartz wrote: [code:1]kill -9 angel11[/code:1] And if that don't work, try sudo-ing it.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Oct 06, 2009 7:11 pm Lui wrote: So could you burn Iruel to a CD? I want one.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Oct 06, 2009 10:22 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Lui wrote: So could you burn Iruel to a CD? I want one.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Tue Oct 06, 2009 10:50 pm What about a portable hard drive.... Also, I don't mean to mini-mod, but could we move back on topic, please?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Oct 06, 2009 11:18 pm CyberXIII wrote: Also, I don't mean to mini-mod, but could we move back on topic, please?

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Wed Oct 07, 2009 4:55 am They hooked it up to the internet, where it was consumed by spam-bots and ads until it was convinced it was the Nigerian Prince of Spanish Lottery and rendered harmless.
summary:
[]: How did they kill Ireul?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sat Oct 03, 2009 2:24 pm That entire episode confused me. How did a computer program kill that Angel?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Oct 03, 2009 2:43 pm Iruel became a virus. Ritsuko did her thing and terminated the virus.

[]:             Quote Po
